docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAUSE, JAMES L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STERN, CLARENCE R. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,039.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
